Newcomer (0 years), first contract, cursed sword (steel, ench 3):
- Base: 100
- Curse: 50 (50% of 100)
- First insurance: 10 (10% of 100)
- No loyalty (0 years < 2)

This should already work with current implementation since all modifiers are in place.
